ಒಂದಾನೊಂದು ಕಾಲದಲ್ಲಿ ಒಂದು ಹಳ್ಳಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಒಬ್ಬ ರೈತನಿದ್ದ. ಅವನು ತನ್ನ ಹೊಲದಲ್ಲಿ ಬೆಳೆಯನ್ನು ಬೆಳೆಯುತ್ತಿದ್ದ. ಒಂದು ದಿನ ಅವನು ಹೊಲಕ್ಕೆ ಹೋದಾಗ ಅವನಿಗೆ ಒಂದು ಹೊಳೆಯುವ ವಸ್ತು ಕಾಣಿಸಿತು. ಅವನು ಅದನ್ನು ತೆಗೆದು ನೋಡಿದಾಗ ಅದು ಒಂದು ಚಿನ್ನದ ನಾಣ್ಯವಾಗಿತ್ತು.

ರೈತ ಬಹಳ ಸಂತೋಷಪಟ್ಟ. ಅವನು ಆ ನಾಣ್ಯವನ್ನು ಜೋಪಾನವಾಗಿ ಇಟ್ಟುಕೊಂಡು ಮನೆಗೆ ಹೋದನು...
Chapter Explanation (Mobile)
Explain — Kathe Keli
Read (Text)
Listen (Speech)
Page 1 of 4248 words
📖 Explanation
This page introduces the story "Kathe Keli" (ಕಥೆ ಕೇಳಿ - Listen to the Story).

Summary: A farmer lived in a village and worked in his field. One day he found a shining object which turned out to be a gold coin.

Key Words:
• ರೈತ (raita) = Farmer
• ಹೊಲ (hola) = Field
• ಚಿನ್ನ (chinna) = Gold
• ನಾಣ್ಯ (naanya) = Coin

Moral concept: Honesty and hard work are rewarded.
Chapter Explanation (Web)
app.chikumiku.com/learn/explain/chapter-3
Chapter Explanation — Kathe Keli

Page 1 of 4Original Text
ಒಂದಾನೊಂದು ಕಾಲದಲ್ಲಿ ಒಂದು ಹಳ್ಳಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಒಬ್ಬ ರೈತನಿದ್ದ. ಅವನು ತನ್ನ ಹೊಲದಲ್ಲಿ ಬೆಳೆಯನ್ನು ಬೆಳೆಯುತ್ತಿದ್ದ. ಒಂದು ದಿನ ಅವನು ಹೊಲಕ್ಕೆ ಹೋದಾಗ ಅವನಿಗೆ ಒಂದು ಹೊಳೆಯುವ ವಸ್ತು ಕಾಣಿಸಿತು...
Explanation
Summary: A farmer lived in a village and worked in his field. One day he found a shining object — a gold coin!

Key Words:
• ರೈತ (raita) = Farmer
• ಹೊಲ (hola) = Field
• ಚಿನ್ನ (chinna) = Gold
• ನಾಣ್ಯ (naanya) = Coin

Concept: Honesty & hard work

A
Maths – Fractions
SOLVE
³⁄₄ + ²⁄₃ = ?
Step-by-Step:
① LCM of 4 and 3 = 12
② ³⁄₄ = ⁹⁄₁₂
③ ²⁄₃ = ⁸⁄₁₂
④ ⁹⁄₁₂ + ⁸⁄₁₂ = 1⁵⁄₁₂ ✓
Your Answer:
1
5
/
1
2
✓ Correct!

A
Triangle with angles 60°, 60°, 60° — what type is it?
A
Isosceles triangle
B
Equilateral triangle ✓
C
Scalene triangle
D
Right-angled triangle
✓ Correct! All equal angles → all equal sides → equilateral

Word Problem (Mobile)
Maths Revision
⏱ 20:00
A shopkeeper bought 12 oranges for ₹60. Sold at ₹7 each. Profit?
Working:
CP=₹60, SP=12×7=₹84
Profit=84-60=₹24
Hint
Submit
Word Problem (Web)
app.chikumiku-learnverse.com/maths/revision
ChikuMiku LearnVerse
DashboardSubjectsRevisionProgress
A
A shopkeeper bought 12 oranges for ₹60. He sold them at ₹7 each. What is his profit?
Your Working:
CP = ₹60
SP = 12 × 7 = ₹84
Profit = 84 - 60 = ₹24
Hint
Submit ₹24
💻 Computers
Code Practice (Mobile)
Code Practice
Python Basics
What does this print?
for i in range(1,4):
  print("*"*i)
A
* ** ***
B
*\n**\n***
C
***
D
1 2 3
💡 range(1,4)→1,2,3; each prints i stars
Code Practice (Web)
app.chikumiku-learnverse.com/computers/practice
ChikuMiku LearnVerse
DashboardSubjectsRevisionProgress
A
What does this code output?
for i in range(1, 4):
  print("*" * i)
A
* ** ***
B
* ** ***
C
***
D
1 2 3
💡 range(1,4) gives 1,2,3. Each iteration prints i stars on a new line.

🎨 Design System

Color Palette

Pink (Primary)
#E94F9B — CTAs, active, branding
Purple (Secondary)
#9B59B6 — Headers, sidebar
Sky Blue
#5DADE2 — Info, audio, English
Gold
#F7C948 — Streaks, hints, Hindi
Green
#27AE60 — Success, correct, EVS
Dark
#2C2341 — Dark backgrounds
Red
#E74C3C — Errors, incorrect
Indigo
#4A6CF7 — Computers subject
Background
#F8F5FF — Page base
Border
#E0D8EC — Dividers

Typography

ElementSizeWeightColor
App Title26pxBold (700)#2C2341
Section Headings16-18pxBold (700)#2C2341
Card Titles13-14pxSemiBold (600)#2C2341
Body Text12-13pxRegular (400)#333333
Buttons11-13pxSemiBold (600)#FFFFFF
Labels10-11pxSemiBold (600)#2C2341
Captions9-10pxRegular (400)#777777
Indic Scripts (Kannada/Hindi)14-52pxBold#2C2341

Spacing & Components

PropertyValueUsage
Card Radius (Large)16pxMain cards, dialogs
Card Radius (Small)10pxInner cards, tags
Button Radius20-22pxPill-shaped CTAs
Input Radius8pxText fields
Card Shadow0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.08)Elevated surfaces
Mobile Viewport360×720pxPhone screen
Web Content Area960px+Desktop browser
Web Sidebar180-220pxLeft navigation
Bottom Nav (Mobile)44pxNavigation bar
Top Navbar (Web)36pxWeb navigation

Platform Targets

PlatformSpecsFeatures
Android Mobile8.0+ (API 26), 320-420pxCamera, mic, offline, notifications
Web ApplicationChrome/Firefox/Safari/Edge, responsiveDrag & drop, keyboard, multi-tab
iOS (Future)iOS 14+, iPhone 8+Same as Android

Logo Watermark Specification

PropertyValue
Coverage75% of screen/page width, centered
Mobile Opacity7% (subtle background)
Web Opacity5% (lighter due to larger area)
Splash ScreenFull logo at 85% opacity
PurposeBrand reinforcement without UI interference
